button.name: GlassButton
button.description: Glass-styled button with multiple variants and loading state.

card.name: GlassCard
card.description: Glass card with elevation variants and hover-lift effect.

input.name: GlassInput
input.description: Glass-styled text input with focus glow.

switch.name: GlassSwitch
switch.description: Glass toggle switch with loading state and label support.

dialog.name: GlassDialog
dialog.description: Glass modal dialog with overlay blur.

dropdown.name: GlassDropdown
dropdown.description: Glass dropdown menu with checkbox, radio, and sub-menu support.

tabs.name: GlassTabs
tabs.description: Glass tabs with icons, badges, closable tabs, and vertical layout.

navbar.name: GlassNavBar
navbar.description: Responsive glass navigation bar with mobile menu and mega-menu.

sidebar.name: GlassSidebar
sidebar.description: Collapsible glass sidebar with nested groups and pin support.

data-table.name: GlassDataTable
data-table.description: Feature-rich glass data table with sorting, pagination, and selection.

chart.name: GlassChart
chart.description: Glass-styled charts (Area, Bar, Line, Pie) with custom tooltips.

command.name: GlassCommandPalette
command.description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search and keyboard navigation.

notifications.name: GlassNotificationCenter
notifications.description: Notification center with categories, mark-read, and dismiss.

segmented.name: GlassSegmentedControl
segmented.description: Segmented control with animated indicator and multi-select.

fab.name: GlassFAB
fab.description: Floating action button with expandable radial actions.
